topic: The newspaper on my porch arrives every morning with tomorrow's date printed on it
title: My Morning Newspaper Arrives With Tomorrow's Date. The Stories Have Not Happened Yet. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The newspaper on my porch arrives every morning with tomorrow's date printed on the masthead.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a rolled morning newspaper resting on a wooden porch with the date band visible at the top of the masthead, dim early morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Suburb. Daily local paper. Subscribed since I retired.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a small single story suburban home with a paper box at the end of a long driveway, dim morning light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Read it with coffee at six AM.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a ceramic coffee mug beside an unfolded newspaper on a wooden kitchen table, dim morning kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Glanced at the date last fall.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a newspaper masthead with a small date printed beneath the title, the day clearly readable, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Thought it was a printer error.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand pointing at the printed date on a newspaper masthead, only the hand and paper visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every day for two months. Always one day ahead.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a stack of recent newspapers on a kitchen counter with the top edges of multiple mastheads visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Called the paper. Confirmed they print today's date.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a corded landline phone receiver held to an ear at a kitchen wall, only the hand visible, dim ambient kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The rest of the paper is dated correctly. Just my copy.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of two newspapers laid open side by side with their dates clearly different on each masthead, dim kitchen table light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Started reading the front page carefully.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open newspaper on a wooden table with several front page articles visible, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Article described a car accident on Highway forty seven. Two cars rear ended at three forty seven. It happened exactly.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a suburban highway intersection at late afternoon with two cars stopped at a slight rear end angle, dim ambient light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I do not read the front page anymore.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a folded newspaper resting on a kitchen counter with the front page facing down, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning's paper had my own obituary in the back section. Dated next Tuesday.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a printed newspaper obituary page with a single boxed obituary visible at the top corner, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
